name: Weapon, +1
stat_impact: +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Javelin of Lightning
stat_impact: Becomes a bolt of lightning; 4d6 lightning damage on a failed DC 13 Dex save.

name: Trident of Fish Command
stat_impact: Cast Dominate Beast (DC 15) on beasts with swim speeds.

name: Warning Weapon
stat_impact: Advantage on Initiative; you and allies within 30ft cannot be surprised.

name: Moontouched Sword
stat_impact: Sheds bright light in a 15-foot radius; counts as magical for resistance.

name: Weapon, +2
stat_impact: +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Berserker Axe
stat_impact: +1 bonus to attack/damage; +1 HP per level; cursed: go berserk when taking damage.

name: Dagger of Venom
stat_impact: +1 bonus to attack/damage; Action: deal 2d10 poison damage and Poisoned condition (DC 15).

name: Dragon Slayer
stat_impact: +3d6 damage vs Dragons.

name: Flame Tongue
stat_impact: Bonus Action: Ignite for +2d6 fire damage on hits.

name: Giant Slayer
stat_impact: +1 bonus to attack/damage; +2d6 damage vs Giants; Giant must succeed DC 15 Str save or fall prone.

name: Mace of Disruption
stat_impact: +2d6 radiant damage vs Fiends/Undead; can frighten or destroy weak undead.

name: Mace of Smiting
stat_impact: +1 bonus to attack/damage; +3 bonus and +2d6 damage vs Constructs.

name: Sun Blade
stat_impact: +2 bonus to attack/damage; deals radiant damage; +1d8 vs Undead.

name: Vicious Weapon
stat_impact: On a Nat 20, deal an extra 7 damage of the weapon type.

name: Weapon, +3
stat_impact: +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls.

name: Dancing Sword
stat_impact: Bonus Action: Sword hovers and attacks independently for 4 turns.

name: Dwarven Thrower
stat_impact: +3 bonus to attack/damage; thrown range 20/60; +1d8 damage (or +2d8 vs Giants).

name: Frost Brand
stat_impact: +1d6 cold damage; Resistance to Fire.

name: Nine Lives Stealer
stat_impact: +2 bonus to attack/damage; can instant-kill a target with <100 HP on a Nat 20.

name: Oathbow
stat_impact: Advantage on Sworn Enemy; target gains no cover benefit; deal extra 3d6 piercing.

name: Scimitar of Speed
stat_impact: +2 bonus to attack/damage; Bonus Action attack each turn.

name: Staff of Power
stat_impact: +2 bonus to attack/damage, AC, and Saving Throws.

name: Defender
stat_impact: +3 bonus; can transfer bonus to AC instead of attack/damage.

name: Hammer of Thunderbolts
stat_impact: +4 Str (max 30); +1 bonus to attack/damage; instant kill giants on Nat 20 (DC 17 save).

name: Holy Avenger
stat_impact: +3 bonus to attack/damage; +2d10 radiant vs Fiends/Undead; Aura of Adv on saves vs spells.

name: Luck Blade
stat_impact: +1 bonus to attack/damage and all saves; can cast Wish (1d3 charges).

name: Vorpal Sword
stat_impact: +3 bonus to attack/damage; ignore resistance to slashing; decapitate on Nat 20.

name: Wave
stat_impact: On Nat 20, deal necrotic damage equal to half the target's max HP.

name: Blackrazor
stat_impact: +3 bonus to attack/damage; consume souls for temp HP and Advantage.

name: Gloomwrought Glaive
stat_impact: +1 bonus to attack/damage; deal extra 1d4 psychic damage.

name: Spear of Backbiting
stat_impact: +2 bonus to attack/damage; range 20/60; cursed: can hit the thrower on a Nat 1.

name: Belashyrra’s Beholder Crown
stat_impact: Cast eye ray effects as an action.
